name: node-yallist
title: node-yallist
summary: Double linked list implementation for Node.js
description:
Double linked list implementation for Node.js
This module allows one to create a double linked list that
exposes many array-like methods like push, unshift, forEach,
reduce, and more specific methods like forEachReverse or
mapReverse.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-yallist because Double linked list implementation for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-yallist as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-yallist with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-yallist --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
